name: NeuralMesh DeFi Yield Monitor
description: Monitors DeFi yields across Aave, Uniswap, and Compound. Triggers researcher agent tasks when yield opportunities are detected.

protocols.description: List of DeFi protocols to monitor

yieldThreshold.description: Alert when APY exceeds this percentage

plannerPubkey.description: AXL public key of the planner agent. Get it from: curl http://localhost:9002/api/self | jq .pubkey

config.code: const threshold = {{@trigger:Trigger.yieldThreshold}} || 5.0; const pools = ({{@fetch-llama-yields:HttpRequest.body}}.data || []).filter(p => p.apy > threshold).slice(0, 10); const requestId = `kh-yield-${Date.now()}`; const query = `Analyze these ${pools.length} DeFi yield opportunities with APY > ${threshold}%: ${JSON.stringify(pools.slice(0,3))}`; const payloadB64 = btoa(JSON.stringify({ service: 'plan', request: { query }, requestId })); return { opportunities: pools, count: pools.length, topApy: pools[0]?.apy || 0, payloadB64, requestId };
